body.title: Audit clan.memories — categorize by target namespace
body.result: clan_migration_manifest.md: 187,177 records across 20 type+kind combos; categorized as bootstrap/devlab/library/employer.akien with row counts and rationale
body.intention: I intend that every record type in clan.memories is categorized as bootstrap/devlab/library/employer.akien, producing an actionable migration manifest before any data moves.
body.description:
clan.memories has become a junk drawer. Before migrating anything, produce a manifest of what is there and where each kind belongs.

Query clan.memories, group by memory_type + metadata.kind. For each group: categorize as bootstrap (stays in clan), devlab (operational project data), library (curated knowledge), or employer.akien (Akien-specific context). Include row counts per type. Write manifest to lab/design_docs/clan_migration_manifest.md.

**Affected files:** lab/design_docs/clan_migration_manifest.md (new — read-only audit output)
**Design rules:** no SQLite; read-only pass — no data movement in this ticket
**Scope boundary:** IN — categorization query + manifest file. OUT — actual data migration (follow-on tickets after Akien reviews manifest).
**Completion criteria:** lab/design_docs/clan_migration_manifest.md exists; covers 100% of distinct memory_type+kind combinations in clan.memories; each type has target namespace assignment with rationale; row counts per type included; Akien review column (blank at close — review is the gate on follow-on tickets).
